---
title: "JsonDataLoadExpansion"
description: "Loop expansion for DataManager JSON load configs"
---

## Overview

`expandDataArrayLoops()` in `src/DataManager/utils/JsonDataLoadExpansion.cpp` expands templated entries in the root `"data"` array before `${variable}` substitution in `load_data_from_json_config()`.

## Placeholder syntax

| Form | When |
|------|------|
| `{loop_name}` | Loop iteration; replaced per value in `"loops"` |
| `${name}` | Inline `variables` or environment (unchanged) |

Brace placeholders are not expanded inside `${...}` tokens.

## Loop definitions

Root `"loops"` maps names to either:

- An array of numbers or strings
- An object `{ "from": int, "to": int, "step": int? }` with inclusive endpoints

## Rules

- Each expandable `data` entry must reference exactly one loop variable in its string fields.
- Entries without `{...}` placeholders are emitted once.
- Objects with `"transformations"` are copied unchanged.
- Invalid entries are skipped with `spdlog::error` diagnostics.

## Tests

`tests/DataManager/json_data_load_expansion.test.cpp` and loop integration coverage in `JsonPipelineRunner.test.cpp`.
